update wct_yuyue
sid = #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shop = #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total = #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ydate = #{ydate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
typecn = #{typecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
typeid = #{typeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
statecn = #{statecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pnote = #{pnote,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf = #{pf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lxr = #{lxr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
roomid = #{roomid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
site = #{site,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
siteid = #{siteid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shiduan = #{shiduan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
room = #{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shiduanid = #{shiduanid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stime = #{stime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
etime = #{etime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update wct_yuyue set sid = #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shop = #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total = #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ydate = #{ydate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, typecn = #{typecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, typeid = #{typeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, statecn = #{statecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pnote = #{pnote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf = #{pf,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lxr = #{lxr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, roomid = #{roomid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, site = #{site,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, siteid = #{siteid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shiduan = #{shiduan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, room = #{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shiduanid = #{shiduanid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stime = #{stime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, etime = #{etime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
